channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iranian missile strikes central Israel amid escalating attacks
item.description: Video shows the moment an Iranian missile struck central Israel, part of a barrage that killed two people.

item.title: Hundreds killed in Haiti drone strikes, including 60 civilians: Report
item.description: Human Rights Watch says drone strikes by Haitian forces kill more than 1,200 people in, near Port-au-Prince since 2025.

item.title: ‘Short-term excursion’: What Trump said about the war on Iran
item.description: Donald Trump called the war on Iran a “short-term excursion”, saying the US already achieved “tremendous success”.

item.title: Air strike kills four Iran-linked fighters in Iraq
item.description: Separately, Iran's Revolutionary Guards target US base in Iraq, as PM Sudani rejects attempts to drag Iraq into the war.

item.title: ‘If there is peace, I will return’: People flee US-Israeli bombing of Iran
item.description: Iranians and foreign workers flee US-Israeli bombardment of Iran, crossing snowy Turkiye border to seek safety.

item.title: Could the US-Israel war with Iran fuel global inflation?
item.description: Oil prices are swinging as markets react to every twist in the conflict.

item.title: Geopolitical analysis of the imposed war against Iran
item.description: This is a war of survival and global consequences.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 11 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: Hundreds of thousands of Iranians rally in Tehran to show their support for the new supreme leader, Mojtaba Khamenei.

item.title: Toddler’s body pulled from the rubble after US-Israeli strikes hit Tehran
item.description: The body of an infant girl was pulled from under the rubble of a residential home in Tehran after a wave of strikes.

item.title: As Israel intensifies Lebanon attacks, Hezbollah disarmament takes backseat
item.description: Ongoing fighting means issue of Hezbollah's disarmament likely to remain on hold, military experts and analysts say.
